feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Insanity
entry.summary:
Author: RomaMarufixx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,003Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin is a patient in a mental health hospital and Arthur is her doctor. Merlin has feelings for Arthur and Arthur has feelings for Merlin, but the two of them shouldn't be together, with their doctor patient relationship as well as their age gap but after fixing some misunderstandings, is there a way for them to be together? Old work originally posted on FF.net in 2013.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 110,230Chapters: 71/?Kudos: 35

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: I'll Save You A Seat
entry.summary:
Author: sherrwin

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,548Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 20

Summary: This short story entails CEO Arthur Pendragon and the one that got away: Merlin Emrys. With a Little Twist: Along with Merlin, follows two young boys of his. His tremendous bundles of joy yet bane of his existence. Together, the two boys unintentionally pull the two lost lovers back together in the absolute most bizarre place: An airplanes’ first class cabin.What else could be said in that situation but, “That’s my son!"Who just so happens to grow up with a father like Merlin, one out of the ordinary. Disclaimer: Merlin has his magic solely for the plot however he wont be using it.

entry.title: In the Clearing
entry.summary:
Author: melody_moon

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,099Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 18

Summary: Prince Arthur had seen a lot in his eight summers, the bustle of castle life, the training of new knights, and the bi-annual magical assination attempts against his father. But he's never seen a frog change colour, or a boy with magic that...wasn't evil? Maybe there was more to magic, than what meets the eye...

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,099Chapters: 9/13Kudos: 88

Summary: Merlin Emrys, 1500 years old, clinical medical examiner, professional hermit, has finally made peace with the fact that Arthur is gone.He has not made peace with this. He has simply gotten very good at pretending. When Detective Inspector Arthur Pennington walks into his morgue on a Tuesday, looking exactly the same and remembering absolutely nothing, Merlin's carefully constructed equilibrium lasts approximately forty seconds. There is also a murder. Possibly magic. Definitely a conspiracy. But mostly, this is about a man who has been in love for fifteen centuries trying to hold it together in a pub while Arthur Pendragon sits pressed against his leg and has no idea. Slow burn. Reincarnation. Heavy on the yearning, light on the sense.

entry.title: A More Worthy King
entry.summary:
Author: remuscariad

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,488Chapters: 8/30Kudos: 554

Summary: Months before Arthur becomes crown prince, an assassination attempt is made on Uther’s life, and he is left with no choice but to ascend the throne. It changes nothing. It changes everything. OR BBC Merlin re-written. Season 1 king Arthur and onto the other seasons.

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,127Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 43

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury.Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own .Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other.There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet.But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it.---------------------------A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed) Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: Partners In Rulership And Magic
entry.summary:
Author: Gxlyleo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,357Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: “Pretty sword,” Merlin says, breaking the silence.Arthurs looks up. They had half sat on the table and their knees were touching. Faces oddly close. Merlin reaches over, the sword is in between Arthur legs, over his lap. Merlin does not seem particularly aware of this as he rounds the Kings hand with his own, his knuckles completely press against---“Long,” Merlin added.Arthur was drunk, of course, that’s why the brush of another body against his crotch was getting him work up.This was wrong.The hand presses down as his friend twists their hands together, “You like it, Arthur?”It could not be. It wasn't. It was the wine, Arthur nodded, trying to swallow. He looked up, regretted immediately but was incapable of looking away. Merlin cheeks were red, his mouth open, wet and plush, blue eyes hooded as he stared down at their joint hands. AKA: Arthur and Merlin keep ending up in bed together but only as best friends, as long as they don't kiss, it doesn't count.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,781Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

entry.title: Haunted Angel, Bright Knight
entry.summary:
Author: paugie_bran

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,185Chapters: 5/24Kudos: 22

Summary: Merlin, with no memory of his previous life, enters Camelot, now an eerie, grey maze of a place where elites train to become future political leaders. The last thing he should be doing is falling for Arthur Pendragon, star swordsman, son of infamous anti-magic proponent Uther and massive whopping prat. Whose life he just can't seem to help saving. But history is threatening to repeat itself. As Merlin begins to see visions of Arthur's death, can he overcome fear and evade tragedy this time around?

entry.title: remembered history
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,887Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: The acadec team needs a history tutor, pretty desperately, and Peter has heard of just the man for the job. Dr. Emerson is apparently immortal so should be really good at it, right? Arthur is enjoying watching the chaos unfold as Merlin attempts to remember what he was wearing on his head in the fifteenth century. Merlin’s pretty sure he had narrowly escaped another execution at that point, so was less worried about what was on his head than he was about keeping it. Merlin, wondering why he agreed to do this, decides to hell with it: let's just tell these kids some stories. No one remembers what actually happened anyway, and perhaps the telling will help. After all, no one's truly dead while there are still people around to remember them. (Featuring Merlin’s retellings of historical events and people he’s met, Arthur’s friendship with the devil of Hell’s Kitchen, and the acadec team with a mystery to solve)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Cheekbones & Consequences
entry.summary:
Author: amariis28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,724Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 28

Summary: This wasn’t supposed to happen.At all.But Merlin could never help it, could he?He just had to stick his nose somewhere it was never needed.Now, he was suffering the consequences.He’s been in this position before though. Many times. In fact, if he could recall the number of times he’d begrudgingly sat on this very desk, that had his initials carved from the amount of times he’s been there, he wouldn’t have enough fingers to put down. That includes his toes too.Right next to him, sat Gwaine. Of course, triumphant marked his face. He seemed to enjoy this a lot.*[work in progress]

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,063,933Chapters: 133/?Kudos: 1,679

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: Deceptions
entry.summary:
Author: confused_moron

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 209,109Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 4,061

Summary: During the train journey following his third year, Harry's entire bloody world was turned upside-down. Overwhelmed by some sudden realisations and his bizarre escape from the future, he discovered that those he had believed to be his most loyal allies were the ones poised to inflict the deepest wounds. However, those he had never deemed trustworthy turned out to be the people who would be standing by his side amidst the war. And Harry finally found himself making profound decisions that would forever alter the course of his life...Includes Dark but not evil Harry, some characters Bashing and mental trauma.  "Ohh sssweet Lady, I, the queen of hell, am sssstuck with an innocent child-" the snake exclaimed, causing Harry to pout as he squirmed in the blonde's lap to find a more comfortable position.   "Hey! Not fair! Wait- queen? "   "Yesss hatchling, I am Manassha the queen of hell ssserpentsss, and you sssweet little hatchling, are my counter-"

entry.title: only threw this party for you
entry.summary:
Author: shutupluke

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,441Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: “Come on then, kiss me,” Merlin says, batting his eyelashes exaggeratedly for good measure. “That’s what a good fake boyfriend would do.” “Maybe I’m a bad fake boyfriend,” Arthur responds archly. “No, you’re not,” Merlin says, sensibly, “because then what would be the actual point of making up this stupid lie, and telling Gwen?” Arthur looks up at him, swallows, and Merlin can tell he’s won. “Fine. I’ll kiss you. No promises about how eye-catching it will be.” Merlin grins. “Believe me, every eye in the room will be on us.” Arthur frowns. “That sounds ominous.” “I know,” Merlin says, waggling his eyebrows.   or Merlin is desperately pining for Gwaine, who does not seem to know or care about Merlin's feelings. Incensed on his best friend's behalf, Arthur offers to pretend to be Merlin's boyfriend for the night. Things unfold exactly as you would expect.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • gratuitous swearing (I’m sorry)
  • and they were roomates
  • Idiots in Love

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 368,658Chapters: 78/110Kudos: 3,492

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…
